scourFinding: Minor scour detected at pier 2. Monitor bi-annually.

scourFinding: Significant scour at arch foundations. CRITICAL - immediate action required.

scourFinding: Extreme scour at all piers. Foundation exposure at pier 2.
notes: BRIDGE CLOSED. Structural assessment confirms inadequacy for any traffic. Emergency repair underway.

scourFinding: Active scour at pier 3. Scour monitor installed.
notes: Critical defect: spalling at beam end bearing. Mass restriction applied as precaution.

scourFinding: Significant scour around timber piles. Pile integrity compromised.
notes: Timber deck heavily deteriorated. Permit required for B-Doubles. Bridge replacement in 2025-26 budget.

scourFinding: No scour detected. Normal sediment deposition.
notes: Minor efflorescence on eastern abutment. Monitoring recommended.

scourFinding: Moderate scour at pier 3 and 4. Wet season monitoring required.
notes: Wet season restriction confirmed. Scour protection works scheduled Q2 2024.
Minor paint blistering on steel truss member. Maintenance painting scheduled.

scourFinding: Low scour risk. River training works adequate.
notes: Bearing replacement recommended at next maintenance window. Deck waterproofing showing age.
